title: ayenia rotundifolia
intro: Ayenia rotundifolia, also known as round-leaf ayenia, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Mexico and Central America, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ayenia rotundifolia include the potential treatment of various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a wound healer. Ayenia rotundifolia can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it accessible for use in traditional medicine and home remedies.
